2026-05-01T20:09:42.9856779Z ##[group]Run # Derive GH_HOST from GITHUB_SERVER_URL so the gh CLI targets the correct
2026-05-01T20:09:42.9857850Z [36;1m# Derive GH_HOST from GITHUB_SERVER_URL so the gh CLI targets the correct[0m
2026-05-01T20:09:42.9858768Z [36;1m# GitHub instance (GHES/GHEC). On github.com this is a harmless no-op.[0m
2026-05-01T20:09:42.9859530Z [36;1mGH_HOST="${GITHUB_SERVER_URL#https://}"[0m
2026-05-01T20:09:42.9860097Z [36;1mGH_HOST="${GH_HOST#http://}"[0m
2026-05-01T20:09:42.9860675Z [36;1mecho "GH_HOST=${GH_HOST}" >> "$GITHUB_ENV"[0m
2026-05-01T20:09:42.9867488Z shell: /usr/bin/bash --noprofile --norc -e -o pipefail {0}
